messages.content:
Can you help me make these sentences to a better english
Already sent quotation to Palo, All staff ok with the new space 
only wait for the director to make decision after check benchmark
- Last time they gave the layout but they ask to see other layout from our interior design to see if there is any other option.

I have already sent the quotation to Palo and the entire staff has approved of the new space. We are currently waiting for the director to make a decision after reviewing the benchmark. Previously, they provided us with a layout, but have requested additional options from our interior design team.

Can you help me write this email.
I have checked monthly financial statement and I found some mistake.
I have already told  J glocal to revise it and send back the correct one.
the details are as follows

Dear [Recipient],

I hope this email finds you well. After checking the monthly financial statement, I have identified a mistake in the report. I have informed J Glocal of the error and have asked them to revise the report and send back the correct version.

I would like to provide you with the following details regarding the correction:

[Include specific details regarding the mistake, such as the affected accounts or figures]

Thank you for your attention to this matter. Please let me know if you require any further clarification or assistance.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Can you add, I want to give you a heads up

Dear [Recipient],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to give you a heads up that after checking the monthly financial statement, I have identified a mistake in the report. I have informed J Glocal of the error and have asked them to revise the report and send back the correct version.

I would like to provide you with the following details regarding the correction:

[Include specific details regarding the mistake, such as the affected accounts or figures]

Thank you for your attention to this matter. Please let me know if you require any further clarification or assistance.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Sure, please provide me with the sentence.
แก้ไขหมวด 2260 เป็น 4400
แก้ไขหมวด 2260 เป็น 2270
แก้ไขค่าเช่าของ QAI จาก APr'23 เป็น May'23
"Revise QAI's rental payment from Apr'23 to May'23."

can you revise this sentence
Change the yellow highlight object category from 2260 to 4400
"Change the category of the highlighted yellow object from 2260 to 4400."
what should i name this email
How about "Correction Request: Yellow Highlight Object Category Change"?
